form.formComment: Racing consistently. Last start by 5 m after showing early speed, (Fr6) at Bendigo (2:40.40) beating Poppy Popstar in NR 42 to 47 on April 8 at $8 at the bell was leading 6.7. Nicely drawn and could go on with it.
